architecture.note: Declared-vs-observed divergence detector on the ontology/CapabilityMap/contract layer, composed onto the capability lint chain. NOT mapped to architecture.noUnknownSystemForSourceFile - mapping the umbrella to one narrow built-in would inflate recall without preserving the guarantee.

canonical_gap.note: Merged into the cluster-A detector; a gap requires a declaration to exist (classic's inferred gaps ran 69% suppression).

ownership_violation.note: Folded into the cluster-A detector; OwnershipMap is the declaration side.

pattern_violation.note: Decision: port (config-declared forbidden patterns). Row flips to ported with a rekonRuleId when the emitter lands (queue #7).

system_anomaly.note: Policed classic's own LLM-vs-signals pipeline disagreement; meaningless in Rekon's architecture.

tech_debt.note: Maps the semantic debt goal to deterministic markers and semantic judgment. Scores by goal-level file-set coverage; unrelated assessment kinds do not satisfy the historical concern merely because they name the same file.

stub.note: Explicit source-backed placeholders map to the placeholder risk; general debt markers remain coverage evidence. Standalone prose-judged stub output is not restored.

anti_pattern.note: Deterministic sub-rules re-expressed as declared policy rules; LLM remainder to the semantic overlay.

dead_code.note: Graph reachability plus compiler-proven unused imports. Classic baseline is LLM-origin: scores by goal-level file-set coverage while rejecting speculative, truncation-derived, and re-export-wrapper claims.

capability_overlap.note: Priority redesign on the capability graph; declared sharing disambiguates intentional overlap from drift.

semantic_similarity.note: Re-entry condition: embedding layer precision-scored against the corpus.

duplication.note: Same re-entry condition as semantic_similarity (file-granularity end of the same goal).

unification_opportunity.note: Same re-entry condition as semantic_similarity (aggregation end of the same goal).

naming_violation.note: Ontology-backed {Entity}{Role} naming-contract check derived from the declared grammar.

lint.note: Classic ran no linter; the model opined on style. Style enforcement belongs to real linters. Consuming real linter output as evidence facts is a separate future decision.

capability_removed.note: Preservation port from classic drift-artifacts.ts (CapabilityChangeReport, outside issues.json - no corpus fire history).
